Caption: A comparison of 8 methods to calculate tortuosity factor for the solid oxide cathode sample reported in [30], the presented model is calculated using TauFactor [29].

(A) A heterogeneous microstructure, Ω 0 , featuring three phases: Ω AP active particle (yellow), Ω E electrolyte (green) and Ω B conductive binder (grey), each with their own transport properties. (B) The homogenised equivalent domain, with transport properties of the three phases represented as effective coefficients. (For interpretation of the references to colour in this figure legend, the reader is referred to the web version of this article.)
